surface_rows.title: Request workspace HTTP send

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Request editing, effective-request review, and metadata-only history stay available locally.
Forwarding pauses without forcing paste-a-token fallback; request files and metadata-only replay remain available.
Managed send keeps the delegated boundary explicit while local request authoring continues.
Mirror/offline mode keeps request review, diff, and metadata exports available without implying a live credential path.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good request route used the same client-certificate binding and target audience without widening scope.

blocked_workflows.workflow_label: Send request with current auth source

repairable_states.next_action_label: Rebind the exact client certificate for this origin

surface_rows.repair_path: Rebind the broker handle or complete browser/device-code auth before send.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Edit request files, inspect the effective request, and export metadata-only history without live credentials.

surface_rows.title: Request workspace history and replay

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local replay keeps history, diff, and request evidence review available.
Replay review stays available when a session-only credential expires in a remote shell or container.
Managed replay keeps delegated authority separate from the saved request history.
Mirror/offline replay can use a bounded session-only secret without persisting raw auth into the history packet.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good replay used the same auth-source alias and scope binding before rotation closed it.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Refresh the replay auth source without mutating stored history

surface_rows.repair_path: Rebind the replayed auth source before dispatch when the prior handle expired or was revoked.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Replay review, diff, and history inspection remain available as metadata-only actions.

surface_rows.title: Database connection picker and live session

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Schema inspection, statement review, and imported-result browsing stay available locally.
Remote/container sessions pause forwarding explicitly instead of asking for a raw password paste.
Managed database sessions narrow to inspect-only when the remote vault is unavailable.

profile_parity_rows.next_action_label: Open imported result or schema snapshot
profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Mirror/offline continuity keeps query review and imported snapshots available without claiming a reconnectable credential.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good session used the same bound database certificate and fingerprint under the current connector policy.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Renew the bound client certificate and retest this connector

surface_rows.repair_path: Rotate the connection-scoped handle, certificate binding, or delegated session before reconnect.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Statement review, schema inspection, and imported-result browsing stay available without a live credential.

surface_rows.title: Database query history portability and replay

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local query-history review and portability diff remain available.
A session-only replay secret can expire without losing the redacted history packet.
Managed portability keeps remote-vault lineage explicit and still excludes raw values from exports.
Mirror/offline replay can accept bounded session input while preserving the same redaction and export rules.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good replay route chained through the platform trust store and admitted the same replay origin.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Inspect the trust source and restore the approved CA path for replay

surface_rows.repair_path: Re-resolve the connection alias or remote-vault reference before replaying a live query.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: History review, portability diff, and redacted exports remain usable without reconnect.

surface_rows.title: Provider/model route resolution

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local provider metadata and draft queues remain available when live routing is closed.
Remote helper routing pauses forwarded credentials explicitly and keeps publish-later fallback visible.
Managed routes keep delegated authority explicit rather than flattening to a generic connected badge.
Mirror/offline provider review stays metadata-only until a live route is re-established.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good provider route completed through the same browser handoff packet and callback correlation envelope.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Retry the exact browser handoff or switch to the bounded device-code fallback

surface_rows.repair_path: Re-issue the delegated grant, renew the browser/device-code session, or narrow the route to a local-safe path.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Account-free local work and cached provider metadata remain available while auth is repaired.

surface_rows.title: Provider scope registry and delegated identity

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local scope inspection and draft fallback remain available without widening authority.
Forwarded scope credentials pause explicitly when the remote boundary changes.
Managed scope review stays available when the delegated scope or grant was revoked.
Offline scope repair can use a bounded session-only secret while keeping durable local drafts separate.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good scope repair path used the same device-code session and delegated scope binding.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Renew the exact device-code session for this scope without widening authority

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good scope mutation used the reviewed delegated scope binding and installation-grant lineage before revocation.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Rebind the exact delegated scope or installation grant before mutating provider state

surface_rows.repair_path: Repair the exact delegated scope, installation grant, or remote-vault lineage that drifted; do not widen to generic connected.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Scope inspection, drift review, and local draft queues remain available without live mutation authority.

surface_rows.title: Registry auth, install, and publish

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Dependency review, lockfile diff, and local resolution stay available on desktop.
Remote package actions keep the forwarded boundary explicit instead of asking for a pasted token.
Managed registry routes can be blocked by policy while dependency inspection remains available.

profile_parity_rows.next_action_label: Use offline cache or mirror review
profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Mirror/offline package review stays honest about cache-only state and never implies live publish authority.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good registry session used the current org-approved CA bundle epoch before it went stale.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Refresh the approved registry CA bundle or switch to the named mirror

surface_rows.repair_path: Rebind the registry handle or refresh the delegated token before install or publish.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Dependency review, lockfile diff, and local-only resolution remain available without registry credentials.

surface_rows.title: Remote preview route and provider handoff

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local preview keeps exact desktop handoff and route review available.
Remote preview pauses forwarded credentials explicitly while preserving route history and revocation details.
Managed preview revocation narrows to metadata-only route history and exact desktop handoff instructions.
Mirror/offline mode keeps exported route evidence and revocation history available without a live preview path.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good preview route used the published pinned control-plane roots for this route class.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Review the rotated route trust root before reopening or sharing this preview

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good preview route used the same delegated preview audience and reviewed share scope before revocation.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Rebind the delegated preview session before reopening or sharing this route

surface_rows.repair_path: Revalidate the preview route trust or delegated session before reopening a remote preview.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Expired previews narrow to metadata-only route history and exact desktop handoff instructions.

surface_rows.title: Infrastructure connector target context

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Manifest inspection, trust review, and safe handoff stay available on desktop.
Forwarding pauses explicitly across SSH/container boundaries while target manifests remain inspectable.
Managed target contexts keep trust and repair lineage explicit when the remote vault path is unavailable.
Mirror/offline target review stays local-safe and never implies a reachable remote control plane.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good target context used the approved SSH fingerprint history for this target identity.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Review the changed SSH fingerprint before reconnecting this target

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good target class requires an approved host-proof record before connection is allowed.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Approve or import the exact SSH host proof for this target

surface_rows.repair_path: Repair SSH host proof, client-certificate binding, or vault trust before reconnecting the target context.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Manifest inspection, drift review, and policy explanation stay local-safe when live connector auth is blocked.

surface_rows.title: Companion session handoff

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Read-only follow state and exact desktop handoff stay available on the local device.
Companion handoff keeps remote/local identity boundaries visible when forwarding pauses.
Managed companion handoff expiry keeps read-only follow state and handoff descriptors visible.
Offline companion review stays bounded to saved descriptors and never implies a live relay.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good companion handoff returned through the same desktop/browser pairing and callback packet.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Repeat the desktop/browser return path without widening the companion scope

surface_rows.repair_path: Complete the desktop/browser return path again before resuming the companion handoff.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Read-only follow state and handoff descriptors stay available without reviving a live companion credential.

surface_rows.title: Managed workspace runtime

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local editing remains available when the managed runtime is absent.
Remote helper execution pauses forwarding explicitly instead of falling back to an unmanaged token copy.
Managed runtime actions narrow to local-safe continuation when the remote vault or host proof path is unavailable.

profile_parity_rows.next_action_label: Recreate managed runtime from mirror evidence
profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Mirror/offline mode keeps the last validated local mirror and honest recreate guidance rather than implying a resumable managed credential.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good runtime resumed through the same remote-vault lineage, delegated scope, and host-proof set.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Rotate the remote-vault lease and revalidate host proof before resume

surface_rows.repair_path: Repair the remote-vault lineage, delegated authority, or host proof before resuming managed runtime actions.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local editing and bounded state inspection remain available when managed credential repair is pending.

surface_rows.title: Managed sync and offboarding control plane

profile_parity_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local history, offline packets, and offboarding exports stay available on desktop.
Forwarded sync credentials pause explicitly across remote helpers while local history remains intact.
Managed sync can be blocked by policy while local offboarding and export paths remain available.
Mirror/offline continuity keeps local history and redacted offboarding packets available without a live sync-plane credential.

repairable_states.last_known_good_summary: The last-known-good managed sync mutation used the same reviewed device-code or browser/device-code renewal window.
repairable_states.next_action_label: Renew the managed sync auth window before mutating remote state

surface_rows.repair_path: Reissue the sync-plane credential or complete the browser/device-code return path before mutating managed sync state.
surface_rows.local_safe_behavior: Local history, offline packets, and offboarding exports stay available while managed sync auth is repaired.

consumer_projections.notes: Docs and help quote the same matrix row ids and credential-mode vocabulary instead of restating connected status.
Diagnostics project the row id, acting identity, and repair owner before showing downstream failure details.
Support export preserves matrix ids, default modes, export posture, and repair owner while excluding raw secret bodies and raw handle ids.
Release/public-truth surfaces publish only the checked matrix id, row ids, and summary vocabulary; they never widen a row with ad hoc prose.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Portable profile exported without raw secret material; rebind required on import.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: profile exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and acting identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Bind a new credential handle for this profile
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Profile import refused to deserialize prior secret material; a fresh handle bind is required.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Workflow bundle exported with credential metadata only; rebind required before install.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: workflow bundles keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Review bundle auth bindings before install
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Bundle install refused to reuse exported secret material; review and bind current handles first.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Portable-state package omits raw secret material and live authority; rebind required on restore.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: portable-state packages keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Rebind the required authority before restore
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Restore paused because the exported package preserved only handle metadata; raw authority did not travel.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Recipe export omitted raw credentials; rebind required before replay.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: recipe exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Recipe replay refused to reuse exported secret material; a new handle or delegated grant must be chosen.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Support bundle exported with omission markers for secret material.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: support bundles keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Open the typed repair or rebind flow
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Support replay keeps the omission visible and requires a fresh bind before any credentialed action resumes.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: AI evidence packet exported with redaction evidence and typed rebind posture.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: AI evidence packets keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Replay is incomplete because the evidence packet preserved only handle metadata; raw credentials were intentionally omitted.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Incident export omitted secret-bearing material and preserved the missing-span marker.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: incident exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Rebind credentials in the incident workspace
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Incident replay stops at a typed rebind step; the original secret material was never serialized into the export.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Offboarding export omitted secret-bearing material and preserved bind requirements.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: offboarding exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Bind replacement credentials on the destination device
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Offboarding import refused to deserialize prior secret material; only rebind-safe metadata crossed the boundary.
